closure_statement: This closure grants no execution, diagnosis, treatment, medical act, belief commit, memory overwrite, world-root rewrite, or safety override authority. It closes only the observe-only Samvrti-to-physical evidence-builder release surface and preserves the rule that Samvrti Qi acceptance is not PhysicalQi or FullPathQi.
